case_title: MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. DANNY HAUPT ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HAUPT, DANNY DBA ALLIED TAX PLANNERS ALLIED TAX PLANNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE REQUEST TO RESET HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-05-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED JAN-15-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAUPT, DANNY DBA ALLIED TAX PLANNERS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ALLIED TAX PLANNERS TO APR-22-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN HANNAH--CO-OWNER. PLAINTIFF WANTS TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO ADD DBA TO DEFENDANTS NAME AND RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE AMENDING OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MUSCLE ACTIVATION OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HAUPT, DANNY DBA ALLIED TAX PLANNERS
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DANNY HAUPT RETURNED= RETURN TO SENDER, NO SUCH STREET, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
